recommendations.title: Carjacked
recommendations.overview: A single mom and her child are carjacked by a bank robber who has no intention of letting them go.

recommendations.title: In China They Eat Dogs
recommendations.overview: Arvid is an ordinary bank clerk who lives a rather unassuming life with his dear girlfriend. But his life is turned completely upside down when he bravely manages to avert a robbery against the bank where he works.

recommendations.title: Two Men in Town
recommendations.overview: A former bank robber is released after 10 years in prison. He gets help from a social-worker, but gets harassed by an old cop from his past.

recommendations.title: Metro
recommendations.overview: Roper, a hostage negotiator catches a murderous bank robber after a blown heist. The bank robber escapes and immediately goes after the man who put him behind bars.

recommendations.title: Take the Money and Run
recommendations.overview: Virgil Starkwell is intent on becoming a notorious bank robber. Unfortunately for Virgil and his not-so-budding career, he is completely incompetent.

recommendations.title: Flag Day
recommendations.overview: A father lives a double life as a counterfeiter, bank robber and con man in order to provide for his daughter.

recommendations.title: Tiger House
recommendations.overview: A young gymnast battles a group of bank robbers at the home of her boyfriend.

recommendations.title: The Shadow's Edge
recommendations.overview: Macau Police brings the tracking expert police officer out of retirement to help catch a dangerous group of professional thieves.

recommendations.title: Justice
recommendations.overview: A young detective seeks the help of a discharged police officer, giving him the chance to reclaim his old life in exchange for solving a bank raid case.

recommendations.title: The Scent of the Night
recommendations.overview: A former policeman turns full-time robber and goes on a downward spiral of crime in 1970s Rome.
